title: Pre-employment screening Personality tests
text:
Pre-employment screening Personality tests

Personality tests · Big Five Personality Test · Short Big Five Personality Test · 16 Personalities Test · DISC Personality Test · Enneagram Personality Test · Leadership Psychometric Test · Psychometric Test For Placement · Culture Fit Test · Social Intelligence Test

Personality tests Psychometric testing can help you to predict a job applicant’s behavior patterns, attitudes, mental reasoning, and personality type. In psychology, the Big 5 personality test is regarded as the gold standard of personality analytics due to it's strong scientific backing. It is the only psychometric test to achieve a scientific consensus.
